title: 3rd International Symposium On Women In Audio Visual Culture
content:
3rd International Symposium On Women In Audio Visual Culture

Writing Rules

Okan Homepage

Homepage

Writing Rules

MENU

The abstract text should be written in both Turkish      and English.

The abstract should consist of at least 250 and at      most 500 words, including the aim, method, findings, conclusions and      recommendations. It should be written as a single paragraph without using      subheadings.

One line space should be left under the abstract      and keywords consisting of 5 words should be given.

Abstract and keywords should be justified on both      sides.

The title of the paper should be written in Calibri      font format with the first letter capitalized, in size 11, all in      bold.

Author names should be written just below the title      and footnotes should be given for each author.

In the footnote section, the author's institution,      department, title, e-mail address and ORCID number must be specified.

Abstracts should be prepared in Word format. Files      in formats such as PDF should not be uploaded to the system.

You can access the pre-prepared Word Template file      containing Macros via the link below.

Click to view the Word Template.
